name: rDNA_chrIII_left_array
description: Left-end rDNA tandem array on S. pombe chromosome III. ~10.4 kb 35S rDNA unit (encoding 18S-5.8S-25S separated by ITS1/ITS2) tandemly arrayed across ~100 kb at the chromosome III left end, immediately interior to the telomere. Estimated ~100-150 copies total across both rDNA arrays; the array length is strain-dependent. ASM294v2 represents the array with a placeholder of nominal sequence; actual copy number requires long-read or CHEF-gel measurement.
expected_copy_count: ~50-75 copies of the 10.4 kb 35S unit in this array (~100-150 copies total across both chrIII arrays)
